title: Exploit Public-Facing Application
description: Attempted exploitation of CVE-2021-44228 on internet banking portal.
remediation: Patch log4j to 2.15.0+, update WAF signatures.

title: JavaScript in Browser Context
description: Attempted XSS execution via stored payload in profile field.

title: Steal Web Session Cookie
description: Attempted cookie theft via MITM attack on mobile API.

title: Exfiltration Over Alternative Protocol
description: Attempted DNS exfiltration of cardholder data.
remediation: Implement DNS filtering and data loss prevention.

title: Valid Accounts Privilege Escalation
description: Used compromised service account to escalate privileges.
remediation: Implement least privilege and PAM solution.
